name: Universal Google Analytics
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This add-on has been deprecated, please use the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1254-google-analytics-4", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics 4"}]}, {"text": " steps."}]}], "appearance": "warning"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Google."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics can track visitors from all referrers, including search engines and social networks, direct visits and referring sites. It also tracks display advertising, pay-per-click networks, email marketing and digital collateral such as links within PDF documents."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install the Google Analytics Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Ensure your Google Analytics account is set up using the Universal Analytics property, not the GA4 property."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel select "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate "}, {"text": "Google Analytics", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click install. In order to locate the Google Analytics addon, please ensure you have the "}, {"text": "All Add-ons", "bold": true}, {"text": " filter selected to see all available addon's."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once the Google Analytics add-on has been installed, click the "}, {"text": "Configure", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Google Analytics tracking ID, which starts with UA, eg. UA-12345678-1", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To find your tracking ID, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/1008080?hl=en#trackingID", "children": [{"text": "Google's help article here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save ", "bold": true}, {"text": "changes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Changes to a custom script require you to authenticate your access. Click the "}, {"text": "Send Token Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and an email will be sent to you with a security token. Copy the token and paste it into the verification field. Click the "}, {"text": "Verify Token", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and your changes can be saved. The token will last two hours in case you need to change multiple scripts."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you need to verify your site ownership with Google, you can opt to use the \"meta code\" verification method. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/426-google-search-console-setup", "children": [{"text": "Click here"}]}, {"text": " for an article on how to verify site ownership."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Google analytics add-on is now installed. To set up ecommerce tracking, Tag Manager, or search console, see the related articles below."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
